_comment: agents-and-skills USER (~/.claude) defaults. The installer only adds top-level defaults missing from ~/.claude/settings.json; existing personal values (including theme and statusLine) always win. `permissions.allow`/`deny` are UNIONED without duplicates; existing values of all other permission sub-keys win. Deliberately NOT shipped (your machine, your call — set them yourself if wanted): permissions.defaultMode (bypassPermissions removes your veto GLOBALLY, against the official warning to use it only in isolated environments; the kits ship web-capable roles), remoteControlAtStartup, effortLevel (cost). The previous file is backed up under ~/.claude/backups/.
